programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As the ghosts converge around and mobilize the Preeminent into a hulking giant behemoth, the Ninja use Airjitzu to fight the mobile beast in an attempt to slow it down.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After the defeat of the ghosts and the destruction of the Cursed Realm, the ninja finds themselves famous all over Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: With Destiny’s Bounty impounded, the police hire Ronin to track down the fugitive ninja. Misako has been arrested and is confronted by Nadakhan, who reveals he has trapped Wu in the Teapot of Tyrahn.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: With the ninja imprisoned, Nadakhan uses the Realm Crystal to free his old crew. The ninja encounter Captain Soto, the first captain of the Destiny’s Bounty, who tells them the story of how he originally trapped Nadakhan in the Teapot.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The secret, he says, is the venom of a Tiger Widow, a rare creature that lives on only one island. The venom can slow a djinn down. Soto is the only one who knows where the island is and will only tell if the ninja breaks him out of jail.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nadakhan vows revenge on the ninja and NINJAGO. The ninja and Soto escape from jail, only to find out the map to the island is on Nadakhan’s ship. Nadakhan discovers that Nya looks just like Delara, his long-lost love.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: The Book of Monsters, having the final pieces of his evil plan in place, tries to take human form.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: A storm is brewing over Knighton. Monstrox has taken the form of a cloud and is raising an army of lightning-infused Stone Monsters.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: The Knights finally make it to the Lava Lands – using their various new forms of transport, which are all strictly civilian vehicles – and they must regroup and learn to fight together again to face the new threat of Jestro, the Cloud of Monstrox.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox encounter the sculptor. He helps unleash a horde of fierce garden gnomes on Knighton. What will the NEXO KNIGHTS do against this new enemy? Will their new COMBO NEXO Powers do the trick?

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox head off on the Evil Mobile to “store” the Forbidden Power in a secret location

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: The NEXO KNIGHTS have their powerful shields stolen by Robot Hoodlum and his Merry Mechs. And something is coming to life in the Petrified forest, and it doesn't like knights. Can the NEXO KNIGHTS deal with this without their shields?

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: The NEXO KNIGHTS decide to use Clay to infiltrate the enemy camp. But first Clay needs to learn how to be a good spy.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox build a new stone army from giant building blocks to crush Knighton.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay and Nya have been holed up at the police precinct, but the Sky Pirates track him down. They flee by boat to the lighthouse where Zane’s father was once held captive. Nadakhan learns that the ninja still have the Tiger Widow venom.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Master Wu mistakenly tries to single-handedly complete a battle he began decades ago against Acronix, one of the twin Hands of Time.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja learn more about the Krux and Acronix – the two fallen Elemental Masters known as the Hands of Time – and are sure that this threat has finally been eliminated.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai's investigation of a Vermillion Warrior Helmet leads him to discover that Krux is alive and well in Ninjago, living under an assumed identity.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In the midst of an epidemic of mysterious metal thefts by the Vermillion Warriors, Lloyd realizes that stepping up and taking over for the ailing Master Wu is not an easy task.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: While the Ninja fight to save MegaMonster Amusement Park, Jay struggles to defend his family's home from the Vermillion Warriors.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja celebrate their escape from the Vermillion Army and their retrieval of the Emerald Time Blade, but with Acronix and Krux determined to get their Blade back, the Airjitzu Temple becomes a battleground.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Secrets are revealed as Nya confronts the Samurai X imposter, Kai pursues the truth about his parents and the other Ninja desperately seek to locate and rescue Master Wu. But as usual, some answers only lead to more questions.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: While Izzie faces off against the King of the Creatures in the dream world, the dream chasers keep Izzie's disappearance a secret in the waking world.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The Never Witch creates a doppel monster to eliminate the dream chasers once and for all as she casts her master spell to undo the dream world.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The Never Witch begins her master spell to reverse the Dream World to it's previous state and the Dream Chasers must race against time to stop her.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: When Mateo's comic creation,Z-Blob,follows him from a dream back to Brooklyn,Mateo and his sister realize the Dream World is real,and in danger!

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: After a daring mission to save their friend in the Dream World,Mateo and Izzie find the nightmare has followed them back to the Waking World.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: To craft their own hourglasses and become official Dream Chasers for the Night Bureau,Mateo and his friends must defeat the Dream Forge guardian.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: As time runs out to face the Dream Forge and become official Dream Chasers,Mateo and his friends enlist the help of the mysterious Dream Bandit.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The search for the Sandman leads Mateo and the others to the tallest mountain in the Dream World,but Lunia's hourglass puts a target on their backs.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: A surprise visit from the Chief Inspector of the Night Bureau forces Mateo to hide Z-Blob,who goes on an adventure in the heart of Brooklyn.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Las noticias anuncian que un meteorito chocará contra la tierra, acabando con todos los seres vivientes. Los Del Barrio se preparan para el Apocalipsis.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe una visita inesperada con una noticia que le cambiara la vida. Mientras tanto Jonathan le ayuda a Peluzín para prepararse para una prueba muy importante.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo entra en el mundo de la actuación y Peluzín es arrestado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego y Peluzin empiezan un Boy Band, Gaspar se ve forzado a integrarse por problemas económicos. El Abuelo intenta comenzar una relación amorosa.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: As usual, Lupin is tossed to and fro by Fujiko. But a man named Buckingham comes to him and sells him "disguise chewing gum" for 50,000 dollars.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The island of Rabaul has many remains of Japanese casualties of the Pacific War. It's said that Captain Cook's secret treasure is hidden there, worth 1-billion pounds. Lupin and gang are after this treasure but they get attacked!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and gang break into the Bank of Stockholm but as usual, Fujiko tries to take the money all for herself. Lupin goes after her but she gets injured in an avalanche. She confesses to Lupin about the location of her most precious treasure…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and friends search a month for the pirate Kid's treasure, but they are thwarted by an underground organization called the Red Ghost. Knowing something is afoot, Lupin sends Fujiko and Goemon to investigate.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin finds a piece of paper in a silk hat, an heirloom of Arsène Lupin. It's information regarding an opal statue of Venus, and since Lupin figures its ownership is his birthright, he heads to Gregoire's castle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Zenigata acquires a pie-throwing gun, and is ordered to capture Lupin. Meanwhile, Lupin and Fujiko are discussing Napoleon's treasures. It's said that the key to solving the mystery of their whereabouts lies in a scarf made by Napoleon's assistant…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The young girl Francoise lives near Lupin; she watches Lupin and Fujiko talking, and falls for him. But her father scolds her and tells her to stay away from thieves, but Francoise devises a plan to approach Lupin anyway…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Professor Pancho has devoted his life to solving the problem of food supply. Lupin decides to help them out and invents a rocket that flies on corn fuel, thinking that maybe he and Fujiko will take a trip to the moon…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is blackmailed; Fujiko has been kidnapped, and for ransom he must steal a jeweled crown worth 100 million dollars. Lupin and friends head to the museum where their objective lies.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lady Black and Fujiko have a bet. Whoever kills Lupin will get the loser's entire jewelry collection. Lady Black lures Lupin using Fujiko so she could kill him, but why is she so passionate about wanting him dead?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Boss Largo wants Lupin dead; Lupin had just stolen a bundle of the boss's casino profits. But no run of the mill hitman would suffice to wack Lupin. But Largo sees that Lupin is suffering from a toothache, and gets an idea.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin reads the morning paper, which says that Lupin stole a 100-karat diamond that was being used in a musical. He knows he didn't do it, so he asks Fujiko and others, but they too have no idea what it's all about.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The nation of Janaica is troubled with coup d'etats and revolutions, but Lupin, discovering that the president's mansion houses the missing painting "Nude Venus," decides to go scope the joint with Jigen.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The master of surrealism, Monsieur Daré had spent three years working on his masterpiece, but news is out that the great object of art got stolen.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Three incidents of bank robbery have happened; a total of 1.3 billion yen was stolen. A man calling himself Goemon is the culprit and he even sends Lupin a challenge, but Goemon wants to settle the score by himself.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin's stash of Napoleon's cash got stolen, but Lupin catches the culprit and tries to make him confess. Turns out he's only one of the followers of the Fandar cult, and heads to their holy land of Fandara.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin learns that a treasure trove lies in a volcano on Cleo Island, but it can only be reached when the mountain isn't spewing molten lava! He tries to convince Jigen and Goemon to join him but they're not interested.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko informs Lupin that fine quality diamonds from South Africa are stored in a safe of a global syndicate and importer of diamonds. Lupin makes his way as a worker in the boiler room, and steals the loot of diamonds.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin finds out about the jewel "Poison Trio" of the Borges family and decides to steal it after Fujiko goads him. Galdan, the nephew of Lucricia greets Lupin, and tells him that elderly Lucricia had been arrested and must be broken out of jail.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin goes on a safe-cracking rampage and rakes in 10 million francs. He needs the money to purchase the world's only rare Gold Butterfly at an auction. But Lupin drops the 10 million francs while on the run…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin scopes a jewelry museum where the billion-dollar gem Cleopatra's Tear is displayed. But Lupin can't get to it because the display case is secured by high-voltage electricity.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: No thief has ever succeeded in stealing the secret gem of Pompeii's nunnery; it's guarded by venomous snakes. Even Arsene Lupin gave up on it, since he hates snakes. But Lupin takes on the challenge. Will Lupin succeed? And what kind of secret gem is it?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Though the tycoon Steel had replaced all his bodily organs with artificial organs to live, he's told that he only has a week to live. There is only one way he could prolong his life, which is to receive a brain transplant and he wants Lupin's Brain.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Famous gourmand and field mice scientist Salmon Whitney is also known as being the chairman of a Canadian diamond mining operation. Lupin is after his diamonds, which will go on auction in Paris.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Coaxed by Fujiko, Lupin decides to steal the diamond chandelier at the Kremlin Palace. He disguises himself as Zenigata and infiltrates the palace, but government police soldier Natasha captures him and throws him in the slammer.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: England's Lord Weather provokes Lupin with a bet, and dares him to steal Red Arrow away from him. Lupin takes the challenge as it's a matter of pride, but Jigen wants no part of it because he and Weather are gambling buddies.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Miami Bank is on the verge of bankruptcy after its last customers closed their accounts. The bank manager Garlic devises a plan to revive the bank, and drums up news that his bank had been raided by Lupin; he also asks Lupin to really do it.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Freddie Freeman starts off his 2020 home campaign with the Braves with a monster day at the plate. Freeman homers, collects four hits and drives in three to lead Atlanta over the Rays, 7-4.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Mookie Betts returned to the leadoff spot for the Dodgers and proceeded to hit three home runs against the Padres. In doing so, Betts tied Sammy Sosa and Johnny Mize as the only players in MLB history with six career three-homer games.

programme.title: World Series Films
programme.desc: This World Series Film showcases the 1996 matchup between the Yankees and the Braves. Rookie of the Year Derek Jeter led New York from a 2-0 deficit to win four straight and bring the World Series back to the Bronx for the first time in almost 20 years.

programme.title: This Week in Baseball
programme.desc: On this edition of This Week in Baseball, the White Sox are the best in the west, Frank Thomas shows up to the clubhouse with a ping pong table, Jim Abbott throws a complete game, and Tim Raines homers for his 2,000th hit.

programme.title: MLB Ultimate Lineup
programme.desc: Check out The Most Memorable First Pitches We Ever Saw! From the good to the bad and everywhere in between, these first pitches stood out from the rest.

programme.title: Epic Moments
programme.desc: Clayton Kershaw is a premier pitcher in his generation, and on June 18th, 2014, he solidified his place in baseball history with a no-hitter that ranks among the best of all-time.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: José Abreu gave the White Sox a 3-2 lead against the Cubs with his first homer of the night. Abreu would go on to hit two more long balls later in the game to give him the first three-homer game of his career.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: After changing his delivery and rebuilding his mindset, Lucas Giolito bounced back from a horrid 2018 season to become one of baseball's most exciting pitchers. This resurgence culminated with his first no-hitter against the Pirates on August 25, 2020.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/13/20: Alec Mills puts together a nine-strikeout start to pull off a no-hitter in the Cubs' 12-0 win over the Brewers.

programme.title: MST3K: Gamera Vs. Guiron
programme.desc: It's Gamera Movie #4, including the Gamera Theme Song and a reenactment of an old favorite magic trick.

programme.title: MST3K: Gamera Vs. Zigra
programme.desc: The seventh offering from Gamera: the infamous turtle faces off against an alien called Zigra determined on world domination. Joel and the Bots build a scale model of Gamera and make shoebox dioramas.

programme.title: MST3K: Hercules
programme.desc: Joel and the Bots have a casual day on the SOL and endure another incoherent Hercules movie (Hercules (1958)).

programme.title: MST3K: High School Big Shot
programme.desc: The crew fights lapsing into a depression while watching the incredibly dour High School Big Shot in which a high school loser takes part in a heist

programme.title: MST3K: Hobgoblins
programme.desc: Mike and the Bots suffer through the 1988 B movie "Hobgoblins," the story of tiny goblin-like creatures who attack a group of teenagers.

programme.title: MST3K: I Accuse My Parents
programme.desc: A young man gets mixed up with a crime syndicate and blames his inattentive parents. The 1940s-era documentary short explains the then-new techniques that enabled farmers to rush produce to market.

programme.title: MST3K: Invasion Of The Neptune Men
programme.desc: Our heroes discover just how boring an alien attack on Tokyo can be when they view an anti-vehicle for Sonny Chiba.

programme.desc: An army commander (played by guest star Theodore Bikel) plots to become dictator by imprisoning an influential cardinal and using a look-alike actor for a public endorsement.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force offers a "fountain of youth" to the vain and dictatorial widow (guest star Ruth Roman) of the late president of a small South American country in order to depose her.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Cinnamon is captured and the enemy discovers the one thing that would unmask her identity and expose the Impossible Mission Force.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The former dictator of a Caribbean island is made to have hallucinatory visions in which he sees his ominous destiny as part of an ingenious plot designed by the Impossible Missions Force.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force is pitted against the ingenious logic of an enemy agent (guest Steve Ihnat) as the IMF attempts to lead the agent through a maze of complicated clues in order to reach a false conclusion.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers puts together a small fountain and shows a video of fountains around the world. King Friday gives a fountain to Westwood. Mayor Maggie searches for water for the fountain and is squirted by Lady Elaine Fairchilde.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Neighbor Aber wears a raincoat as Lady Elaine continues squirting water from her hose. He helps Corney install an umbrella over the factory. Mr. McFeely stops by with a videotape about how people make concrete sidewalks.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a television studio where the series Arthur is being animated. Mr. McFeely brings a video about how people make traffic signals. Arthur meets the puppets in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Captain Arnold shows Mister Rogers various aspects of being a firefighter. Volunteer Firefighter Handyman Negri asks Lady Elaine for her garden hose. Smoke is seen coming from the Platypus mound. Lady Elaine puts out the fire.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Fred Rogers visits a school and sees what the students do during a fire drill. Everyone is working to repair the Platypus Mound, which was damaged by a fire. Lady Elaine Fairchilde receives an award from King Friday XIII.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers demonstrates how to use a computer mouse as he introduces viewers to the "online neighborhood." The King and Queen are searching for the "royal mouse."

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers watches demonstrations of mechanical ball inventions. Prince Tuesday and Lady Aberlin are outside the castle playing with a unique toy. King Friday is unhappy about not finding Hula Mouse and breaks the toy.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers watches children dancers perform and musicians play. King Friday sincerely apologizes to Hula Mouse for his previous behavior. Lady Elaine presents an exhibit of round things. Mr. McFeely shows a film on how marbles are made.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks about curiosity. He uses a frame to look closely at different parts of a large mural, and the vegetables in the piece remind him of his trip to "The Edible Schoolyard" in Berkeley, California, where children garden.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Guitarist Manuel Barrueco provides an amazing performance. King Friday requests a "looking inside things device" from Corney. The best Corney could come up with is a "look carefully device" magnifying glass.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Lost Army of King Cambyses
programme.desc: While escaping the Egyptians 2,500 years ago, the Persian King Cambyses led his army into the desert and disappeared forever. Despite efforts in the 1930s to discover what happened to him, no clues were found until 1996.

programme.title: Alexandria
programme.desc: Bettany Hughes looks at Alexandria past and present, unearthing archaeological gems and following in the footsteps of Hypatia, the city’s last great female philosopher and guardian of great Library of Alexandria.

programme.title: Egypt's Lost Queens
programme.desc: Prof. Joann Fletcher explores what it was like to be a woman of power in ancient Egypt. This programme brings to life the remarkable leadership and influence wielded by women whose levels of freedom were unique in the ancient world.

programme.title: Ancient Egypt Life and Death in the Valley of the Kings
programme.desc: In this first episode, we explore life in Ancient Egypt; the tightly packed houses where ordinary people lived, the village that was their home, how they dressed and what they ate.

programme.title: Ancient Egypt Life and Death in the Valley of the Kings
programme.desc: In this episode, we discover a strange and mysterious world: the Ancient Egyptian afterlife. To them, life was just a dress rehearsal for the perfect afterlife they were trying to reach.

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery
programme.desc: The Pyramid of Khufu is the only one of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World which can still be seen in its original state. 146 metres high, 230 metres wide, and made from almost 2.5 million blocks, the Pyramid of Khufu breaks all the records.

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery
programme.desc: At the heart of Saqqara, the largest necropolis in Egypt, which was built around 2600 BC, is the Step Pyramid of Djoser. This pyramid, with its unusual design, is the first and most complex of all.

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery
programme.desc: Meidum is the least-known of the pyramids of Egypt, but the most mysterious. It stretches skywards and resembles a castle keep. Thanks to archaeology 2.0 and its drones, scientists can delve into the heart of this building.

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery
programme.desc: On the site of Dahshur, 40 km to the south of Cairo are two revolutionary monuments which would seem to be the first real pyramids. A link in the chain, which is essential to understanding the evolution in the building of pyramids.

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery
programme.desc: The whole world has its eyes riveted on the Pyramid of Khufu, in Egypt. Yet, on the Giza plateau, other architectural masterpieces stand up to the test of time: the sphinx, the lion with a human head, and the pyramids of Pharaohs Khafra and Menkaure.

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery
programme.desc: You have to climb and follow paths that don't always appear on maps in order to discover one of the best-kept secrets of the dynasties of pharaohs which was long hidden in the sand.

programme.desc: Oblivion 2: Backlash! No, it's not just a compilation of all the backlash the first Oblivion received, it's the title of a direct-to-video sequel to Oblivion. What did we do to deserve this? No, seriously, what did we do to deserve this.

programme.title: Fronteras peligrosas de Latinoamérica
programme.desc: En el Control Fronterizo de Santa Rosa, un ciudadano Peruano es descubierto con cincuenta mil dólares sin declarar. En el Complejo Fronterizo de Colchane los agentes descubren a una mujer golpeada y van e busca de su agresor.

programme.title: Fronteras peligrosas de Latinoamérica
programme.desc: En Colombia un grupo de jóvenes mochileros descubren un cadáver. Miembros las fuerzas de seguridad peruanas patrullan rutas clandestinas de contrabandistas. Una familia estaba cruzando el Puente Internacional de Rumichaca y son detenidos.

programme.title: Metrópoli CDMX
programme.desc: La policía descubre una narco tienda en un túnel y captura a un asaltante protegido por sus vecinos. El ERUM presta auxilio en un incendio.

programme.title: Comedy Central Presents

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live

programme.desc: Mike Lawrence weighs in on Christian Bale's Batman, Marina Franklin admires Michelle Obama, Brendon Walsh describes his breakup style, and Greg Behrendt recalls his punk days.

programme.title: The Half Hour

programme.title: Comedy Central Presents
programme.desc: Tig Notaro describes nonsensical SkyMall items, wonders what her cat is thinking and learns about cultural sensitivity from Barbies.

programme.title: Comedy Central Presents

programme.title: Comedy Central Presents

programme.title: Comedy Central Presents

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 returns from a mission with an artifact that triggers the ability to see hideous yet harmless life forms in a parallel reality. As the effect spreads to civilians, O'Neill and his team must find a solution before mass hysteria breaks out.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Colonel Maybourne visits O'Neill and claims to have a key to a cache of alien technology, but demands a presidential pardon in exchange for it. When SG-1 accompanies Maybourne to retrieve it, they find his intentions may not be all they seem.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 discovers that Nirrti is mutating the inhabitants of an unexplored planet with a machine that rearranges their DNA. Captured in an attempt to stop her, O'Neill must find a way to escape before he and SG-1 are subjected to the same fate.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: General Hammond and the Pentagon are forced to reveal the existence of the Stargate to other world governments. Senator Kinsey suggests that General Hammond be relieved of his command and that the civilian-run NID oversee the Stargate program.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 discovers three human survivors on an off-world planet who claim to be under attack by hostile aliens. While Carter helps repair the ship's computer, she learns that the survivors are hiding a secret…and things may not be all they seem.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Teal'c mysteriously begins to hallucinate and is haunted by visions of an existence where he is a human being. As his paranoia deepens, Teal'c must rely on the help of friend Daniel Jackson to determine where his dreams end...and his reality begins.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 accompanies the X-53 on its voyage into deep space. When the ship drops out of hyperspace, SG-1 is stranded with no means of getting back to Earth. Their only option lies in exploring a nearby planet where a Stargate is thought to be located.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 encounters a civilization desperate to be freed from the clutches of a Goa'uld. While on the planet, Jonas falls ill. His illness is diagnosed as a brain tumor but it gives him the ability to see the future...where SG-1 are walking into a trap!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Daniel appears to O'Neill and alerts him that Anubis has located the Eye of Ra, an object of power hidden on Abydos. With Daniel's help, SG-1 find the Eye first. Determined to have it, Anubis threatens to destroy the planet unless they hand it over.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: As SG-1 begins its search for the Lost City, they discover that Jackson has been returned by the Ancients without any memory of who he was. While SG-1 tries to help him regain his memory, they discover that the Lost City is not on the same planet.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Anubis travels to Kelowna after discovering that it has mines of a more powerful source of energy that he can use to make his new weapon more destructive. The leaders of Kelowna contact SG-1 for their help, but make an ill-advised deal with Anubis.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time, THE AMAZING RACE features 11 new teams of all dating duos: six who are preexisting couples, and five duos who meet for the first time at the starting line.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Nagano, Japan where Racers take on an Olympic-sized Detour, and one team takes a tumble that may jeopardize their chances in the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Tensions rise in Thailand as one team forgets their fanny pack, putting them behind, and one Racer celebrates the end of the leg when they pop a very special question.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Visit a lovely mountain setting with Bob Ross, complete with leafy trees and evergreens, and step into a secluded fishing spot just perfect for casting a line.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross as he paints a lovely scenic mountain surrounded by quiet, soft, misty foothills - a beautiful painting that even a beginner can do with ease!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack heads to Seminole country in the Florida Everglades and gets way more than he bargained for. This adventure's got him uncovering alligator nests, and wranglin' some big gators that need to be released back into the wild.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jack and his family as they immerse themselves in the jungles of Peru.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he heads to Australia's Gold Coast. Meet a rare blue-eyed koala, feed a Tasmanian devil and watch a tiger jump over Jack! Things get messy when Jack meets up with some boys from the outback and tries his hand at an Aussie tradition.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Jack to the Future
programme.desc: Today, it’s a two-for-one special, as Jack travels to each location TWICE! Cheetahs, rhinos, manatees, kangaroos and more! Join Jack for time-traveling tour through natural history.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for a journey with some of the animal kingdom's most outstanding omnivores! Baboons, Black Bears, Chimpanzees, two-toed Sloths and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Panama's coastal town of Pedasi is a haven for sea creatures. Jack encounters a nesting Sea Turtle, before visiting Isla Iguana where he searches for Black Iguanas, a colony of Frigate Birds, and a whole lot more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Need for Speed
programme.desc: Today’s countdown is taking a ride in the fast lane with some of nature’s speediest creatures…horses, kangaroos, cheetah, falcons and more. Don’t blink! You might miss one of today’s super-sonic species.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Hoof It
programme.desc: Giraffes, zebras, moose and bongo have very different coats, but they all wear the same shoe style. We’re talking about hoofs, of course! Join Jungle Jack as he counts down today’s featured creatures, all the way to number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Just Beachy
programme.desc: The creatures on today’s countdown love the beach just as much as Jungle Jack! Come along for a coastal adventure with African penguins, sea lions, marine iguanas, elephant seals and sea turtles.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Sue meet up with renowned conservationists Chryssee and Esmond Bradley Martin in Kenya and see hyenas, warthogs, and even a cheetah, before searching for white rhinos in Nairobi National Park.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack in a place near and dear to his heart, Rwanda's Akagera National Park, where he finds new hope for wildlife after years of turmoil. Then Jack gets up close and personal with the biggest wild elephant he's ever seen in his life!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join the Hanna family as they literally see-through this species, release an endangered sea turtle and learn just how important bats are to the ecosystem…and to inspecting Jack's hair!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he meets up with some of nature’s biggest eaters! Crocs, African wild dogs, bears, gorillas, lions, jackals and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Meet some of the best-dressed animals on the planet! Penguins, Leopards, Painted Dogs, Zebras, Lions, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Costa Rica, Jack treks through the pristine Corcovado National Park in search of the elusive jaguar. On a night hike, Jack comes face-to-face with the tapir, a rainforest relative of the rhinoceros.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Home Turf
programme.desc: Meet the animals that are masters of their domain. These creatures know how to protect their territories and themselves. Hippos, elephants, guanacos, elephant seals and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack goes to work behind the scenes at the world-renowned Ann van Dyk Cheetah Center in South Africa where over 800 Cheetah cubs have been bred in the last 40 years. Jack also comes face-to-face with rare African Wild Dogs.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he crisscrosses the globe in search of animals who live in truly distinct habitats on the equator. Mountain gorillas, forest elephants, jaguars, orangutans, creatures from the Galapagos Islands, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Seeing Red
programme.desc: Jungle Jack Hanna is seeing red in this exclusive Wild Countdown! Discover why this color is so important to the survival of these animals in their natural habitats and find out who comes out on top!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he reveals how to tell the difference between some commonly confused creatures, like Cheetahs and Leopards, Crocs and Gators, Penguins and Puffins, Turtles and Tortoises and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack explores villages that are way off the beaten path to meet the people who live there and the animals that surround them, like cheetahs in South Africa, spider monkeys in the Amazon, hippos along the Zambezi, lions in Kenya and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for a journey into the Danger Zone. He’s coming face-to-face with a deadly bushmaster, visiting mountain lions in close quarters, crossing paths with a grumpy elephant, climbing into a cave filled with bats, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is headed to South Africa to explore one of the most ground-breaking reserves on the continent – Shamwari. What once was old farming land, is now a meticulously restored eco-system brimming with wildlife and adventure.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Deep in the Amazon River basin of Peru, Jack discovers a group of young conservationists working to save orphaned and injured animals at Taricaya Rescue Center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack heads into South Africa's Zululand for an adventure with Cheetah, Rhino, Dung Beetles, and the Nyala antelope. Then he is welcomed into a Zulu tribe, with his daughter Kathaleen.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack's taking a Jungle Cruise through the Amazon as he searches for elusive pink river dolphins. But, along the way, Jack gets a lot more than he bargained for… from a sloth to giant river otters and even anacondas!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Jungle Critters
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he uncovers creatures living in the deep, dark jungle. Elusive reptiles like pythons and caimans, river-dwellers like piranha and Amazonian manatees and massive primates like lowland gorillas.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For the forensic entomologist, the insects that nest in dead bodies are like tiny witnesses to a crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some cases simply can't be solved with current technology or with the evidence at hand. But that doesn't mean they'll remain unsolved forever.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tiniest residue left at the scene can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They know as much about crime as any crime fighter, or any criminal. They're the crime writers, and through their eyes we see murder most foul.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Ballistics: A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head; the weapon lies next to the victim. It looks like suicide, but could it be murder? It's a question best solved by ballistics experts.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Killers often attempt to deflect attention away from their crimes by hiding the remains of their victims. Bodies may lay hidden for years before they are discovered.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Psychological Profiling: Journey into the dark recesses and calculated madness present only in our worst nightmares…and in the minds of serial killers.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Identifying Burned Remains: It's difficult to have a murder investigation without a body, and burning up the victim is a time-honored method of destroying physical evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a victim is gunned down at point-blank range, police often assume that a friend or acquaintance is to blame.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Solving crimes may begin with gut intuition, but advanced science provides investigators with irrefutable proof. When criminals go to great lengths to mask their crimes, Investigators must step up the challenge and remain forever …undaunted.

programme.desc: Flooding in the Mississippi Delta has raised water levels almost two feet and now the once unreachable corners of the bayou are accessible.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: The swampers are facing the toughest stretch. Worn down, the best spots have already been fished, and one unexpected turn can sink the season. In Pecan Island, Liz and Kristi start slow.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: With only 5 days left in the season, the swamp is blindsided by a cold front sweeping across Louisiana, bringing a punishing frigid rain. When temperatures drop, gators run for cover, and the hunters will have to chase them down.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: It's down to the final 4 days and Troy's road to the crown takes an unexpected turn. A good friend and a fellow hunter passed away. When his long-time helper asks Troy to help fill their remaining tags, Troy has a dilemma.

programme.title: Ax Men

programme.title: Ax Men

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bakura and good Marik summon The Winged Dragon of Ra, ready to blast and banish evil Marik into the Shadow Realm. But The Winged Dragon of Ra has more than one special ability, and evil Marik knows how to use them all.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba's blimp is hijacked by a mysterious boy named Noah and his henchmen - five familiar foes from Yugi and Kaiba's past who are out for revenge!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The first to duel under the all-new Deck Master System is Yugi against Big 1 Gansley's Deepsea Warrior! Can Yugi master the complex new rules, or will the rules master him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Yugi struggles to make heads or tails of the Deck Master System, Big 1 uses his Deck Master ability to send all of Yugi's attacks right back! How can Yugi defeat an opponent when his attacks take away his own life points?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's running out of life points, but can his cute little Deck Master Kuriboh unleash his furry fury to turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Prepare for a feathered fight when Téa squares off against Big 2 Crump's Nightmare Penguin where the loser will be trapped forever in a block of ice!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Téa's body turns more and more into a giant popsicle, can she keep her brain from freezing to find a way to melt Big 2's strategy? Or will Big 2's penguin horde waddle all over her?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey squares off against the judicial jerk Big 3 Johnson who takes the Deck Master form of Judge Man! How can Joey defeat a foe who can destroy Joey's monsters at will?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Just when Joey seems to gain the upper hand, he hits the longest streak of bad luck in the history of mankind! Has Joey's fortunes finally run out, or is a crooked judge ignoring the rules of the law?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Big 4 Nezbitt challenges Duke, Tristan, and Serenity for the right to gain control of three bodies at once! Will Serenity's errors cost her team the ultimate price when Tristan and Duke can't cover for her mistakes?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: One down, two to go! With the loss of Tristan, Serenity is heartbroken. Can she pull herself together and remember the lessons Tristan taught her to turn the duel around?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Tristan's back... but he's not who he appears to be when he kidnaps Mokuba! It's time for Kaiba to stop monkeying around and rescue his brother, but he's confronted by Big 5 Leichter!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Big 5's Satellite Cannon attacks Kaiba's monsters from deep space! Mokuba's unwavering faith in Kaiba inspires him to believe that his brother will pull out the victory, but Noah has plans to ruin their brotherhood...

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba arrives at Noah's sanctuary to rescue Mokuba, but Mokuba wants to stay with Noah! Has Mokuba seen the evil within Kaiba, or is something more sinister in the works?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Noah gives the Big Five one last chance to redeem themselves in a five-on-two tag team duel where Yugi and Joey take on the entire Big Five!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Big Five concentrate their attack on Joey so that Yugi would be forced to duel all alone! Outmanned and overpowered, Yugi and Joey are near the end of the line!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Big Five summon an almighty dragon that previously defeated Joey, Mai, and Mokuba! Joey and Yugi pull out all the stops, but is that enough to avoid their minds being scattered over virtual reality?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a duel for control of KaibaCorp when Noah squares off against Kaiba! But can Kaiba fight at full strength after he learns the hidden truth about Noah... and the tragic past that made him what he is today?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Noah's Shinato's Ark steals monsters into its keep to use as an impenetrable wall of servants! How can Kaiba hurt Noah when Noah has an endless stream of monsters to protect himself with?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba's about to finish Noah, but Mokuba protects Noah from his final blow! Will Kaiba sacrifice his beloved brother in exchange for freedom, or will the brotherly bond remain unbreakable?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: For every turn that passes, one of Yugi's friends is transformed into stone! As more and more of his friends harden into solid rock, can Yugi defeat Noah before he runs out of turns and transforms into stone himself?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's friends are petrified into solid stone statues, but their spirits live on! Their combined souls energize Yugi into a noble fight, but is spirit going to win the duel when Yugi's not drawing the right cards?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi has defeated Noah... but they still can't escape from the virtual world! The real reason behind their entrapment is revealed... as is the true villain pulling the strings!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Kaiba squares off against his stepfather Gozaburo for their final battle, Yugi and friends are attacked by endless hordes of monsters! Their only hope is Noah, but they can't expect help from their enemy... can they?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Time is almost up before the missile's explosion destroys Yugi and friends! Will the Battle City finalists beat the clock and live to duel another day in the stunning conclusion to the virtual world saga!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends arrive at KaibaCorp Island where the Battle City finalists will compete in the ultimate dueling arena! Get ready for the awesome four-person battle royal where any duelist can attack anyone else!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Honor, friendship, revenge... As each duelist remembers what they're fighting for, the battle royal rages on where none of the duelists know where the next attack is going to come from!
